Effect.description: Skill template to add to actor after movement finishes. Created via SkillTemplate.CreateSkill and added to SkillContainer.

DisciplineModMult.description: Multiplier applied to authority discipline modifier. Clamped via FloatExtensions.Clamped, then multiplied by StrategyState discipline mod and added to param+0xA0.

ObjectToAttach.description: GameObject prefab to instantiate and attach to entity. Spawned at spawnpoint position when skill is added.

AttachAtInfantry.description: Index into spawnpoint list for player-controlled entities. Uses Element.GetSpawnpoint with this index.

AttachAt.description: Index into spawnpoint list for enemy entities. Used when IsPlayerControlled returns false.

Prefab.description: GameObject prefab to spawn on animation event 0xF (AttachTemporaryPrefab). Destroyed on event 0x10 (DetachTemporaryPrefab) or OnAfterUse.

AttachmentSlot.description: Slot enum determining attachment point name via VisualAlterationSlotExtensions.GetAttachmentPointName.

LocalOffset.description: Local position offset applied to spawned prefab transform (12 bytes: x,y,z floats at 0x64, 0x68, 0x6C).

LocalRotation.description: Euler rotation offset in degrees applied to spawned prefab (12 bytes at 0x70, 0x74, 0x78). Converted via Quaternion.Internal_FromEulerRad.

LocalScale.description: Local scale applied to spawned prefab transform (12 bytes at 0x7C, 0x80, 0x84).

ActionPoints.description: Action points to add to target actor's current AP. Target is determined via GetTargetActor from tile entity.

Effect.description: Skill template to grant target actor if their new AP exceeds max AP. Created and added to target's SkillContainer.

CostPerAttack.description: Additive flat bonus to attack cost. Added directly to param+0x44 (attack cost property).

CostPerAttackMult.description: Multiplicative modifier to attack cost. Applied via FloatExtensions.AddMult_StackPercentages to param+0x48.

HeatPerUse.description: Additive change to HeatCapacityHandler.HeatPerUse (handler+0x24). Positive increases heat per use.

MaxHeat.description: Additive change to HeatCapacityHandler.MaxHeat (handler+0x28). Result clamped to minimum 0.

RoundsToCoolDown.description: Number of rounds skill is unusable after use. Stored to handler+0x20 (remainingCooldown) on use.

AIOnly.description: If true, cooldown only applies when user is not player-controlled. Checked via Entity.IsPlayerControlled.

Flag.description: Bitmask of EntityFlags. Skill is disabled when (EntityFlags & FlagMask) == FlagMask (all flagged bits set).

ActionPoints.description: Action points to grant actor on skill added. Applied via Actor.SetActionPointsUnsafe, capped at EntityProperties max if Force is false.

AlwaysIncreaseMaxActionPoints.description: If true, bypasses max AP cap and grants full Amount. If false, gains capped to not exceed max AP.

ActionPointsAvailable.description: Multiplier applied to current AP when granting bonus turn. New AP = currentAP * multiplier. Typically 1.0 for full AP restoration.

AccuracyBonus.description: Additive accuracy bonus applied to EntityProperties+0x68 (AccuracyBonus). Typical range 0-100.

AccuracyMult.description: Multiplicative accuracy modifier applied via AddMult to EntityProperties+0x6C (AccuracyMult). 1.0 = no change.

AccuracyDropoff.description: Additive evasion bonus applied to EntityProperties+0x70. Increases chance to evade attacks.

AccuracyDropoffMult.description: Multiplicative evasion modifier applied via AddMult to EntityProperties+0x74. 1.0 = no change.

OnlyUsableIfActorHasSkill.description: Skills that MUST exist on entity for this ability to be usable. Empty list = no requirement.

NotUsableIfActorHasSkill.description: Skills that BLOCK usability when present on entity. Having ANY blocks the skill.

HiddenIfActorHasSkill.description: Skills required for ability to be VISIBLE. Hidden if entity lacks any required skill.

NotHiddenIfActorHasSkill.description: Skills that HIDE the ability when present. Having ANY causes IsHidden to return true.

MaxUses.description: Maximum times this passive can trigger per mission. Default constructor sets to 3. Copied to runtime RemainingUses (skill+0xA8) at mission start.

RequiredWeaponCount.description: Weapon slot configuration: 0 = requires exactly 1 weapon equipped, 1 = requires exactly 2 weapons equipped. Controls skill.IsEnabled based on equipped count.

UseLastTargetOfSkill.description: Skill template to find in container. Retrieved skill's lastTargetTile (skill+0x68) used as override target tile.

ReductionPerStack.description: Armor reduction per stack. Total reduction = stackCount * perStackReduction, capped at MaxReduction.

MaxReduction.description: Maximum total armor reduction. Applied via AddMult_StackPercentages to param+0x28 (armor stat) as (1.0 - cappedReduction).

Animation.description: Animation sequence to play at tile position when squaddies successfully refilled. Started via AnimationSequenceManager.

RequiredType.description: Skill type enum for defect removal. Used with Skill.IsSkillType to filter which defects can be removed. Handler finds highest-scoring matching skill.

Parameter.description: Template for animator parameter. Hash retrieved via GetAnimatorHash, set as int with skill's CurrentAmmo (skill+0xA8).

ConsumedOnTrigger.description: If true, removes parent skill after intercepting and returning attack. Checked in OnAfterSkillUse before counter-attack.

Range.description: Maximum tile distance for scanning. Actors within range have blips spawned and are marked detected by faction.

Scanline.description: Scanline visual effect prefab instantiated at target position. Duration controlled by ScanlineDuration.

ScanSpeed.description: Duration for scanline effect. Scanline component speed set to 1.0 / duration.

DetectsInfantry.description: If true, also detects mounted/embedded actors. Checked before processing actor iteration.

DetectsVehicles.description: If true, detects player-controlled units. If false, only detects non-player units.

Flag.description: Flags to set on entity. Special handling: 0x800 (FLAG_SHOW_HUD) triggers StructureHUD.Show for Structure entities.

IconToShow.description: Icon type enum. Value 1 = TargetPainted icon, controls visibility via UnitHUD.SetTargetPaintedIconVisibility.

Radius.description: Threshold for isolated icon display. Set via UnitHUD.SetIsolatedThreshold at mission start. Default value 2 (from constructor).

Icon.description: Sprite to display as skill condition icon on UnitHUD via SetSkillConditionIcon.

Target.description: Target selection mode: 0 = SingleTarget (checks conditions on specific actor), 1 = AllEnemies (iterates all actors via ForEachActor).

Conditions.description: Array of conditions that must pass for icon to display. Evaluated via CheckConditions before showing icon.

Prefab.description: Prefab to instantiate at target tile world position on skill use. Spawned with identity rotation.

ActiveSkills.description: Array of skill templates to toggle. Only skill at current index (handler+0x20) has IsEnabled=true, all others false.

Concealment.description: AP cost per tile of vehicle movement. Added to Actor.tilesMovedThisTurn (Actor+0xD4) when movement flag (handler+0x20) is set.
